action.name: Open terminal here
action.description: Open a terminal in the current directory

action.name: Open root window
action.description: Open this directory with a root instance

action.name: Optimize PNG image(s)
action.command: noctalia-shell ipc call toast send '{"title": "Image optimization", "body": "Optimizing the selected image(s)…", "icon": "image"}'; for file in %F; do oxipng --strip all "$file"; done; noctalia-shell ipc call toast send '{"title": "Image optimization", "body": "Image(s) optimized.", "icon": "image"}'
action.description: Optimize the selected PNG image(s) with oxipng

action.name: Optimize JPEG image(s)
action.command: noctalia-shell ipc call toast send '{"title": "Image optimization", "body": "Optimizing the selected image(s)…", "icon": "image"}'; for file in %F; do jpegoptim -s "$file"; done; noctalia-shell ipc call toast send '{"title": "Image optimization", "body": "Image(s) optimized.", "icon": "image"}'
action.description: Optimize the selected JPEG image(s) with jpegoptim

action.name: Batch convert JPG+PNG to JPEG XL
action.command: noctalia-shell ipc call toast send '{"title": "Image convertion", "body": "Converting all JPEG and PNG images in the current directory to JPEG XL; The original files are kept. The system will be slowed down during this CPU-intensive operation.", "icon": "image", "duration": "10000"}'; parallel cjxl -e 8 -d 0 '{}' '{.}'.jxl ::: *.{png,jpg,jpeg}; noctalia-shell ipc call toast send '{"title": "Image convertion", "body": "Image convertion to JPEG XL has finished", "icon": "check"}'
action.description: Convert all PNG files in this directory to JPEG XL files (the PNG Files are kept).

action.name: Batch optimize PNG images
action.command: noctalia-shell ipc call toast send '{"title": "Image optimization", "body": "Optimizing all PNG images; The system will be solwed down during this CPU-intensive operation.", "icon": "image", "duration": "5000"}'; oxipng --strip all *.png; noctalia-shell ipc call toast send '{"title": "Image optimization", "body": "PNG images optimized."}'
action.description: Optimize all PNG files in the current directory

action.name: Recursively optimize PNG images
action.command: noctalia-shell ipc call toast send '{"title": "Recursive image optimization", "body": "Optimizing all PNG images recursively; The system will be solwed down during this CPU-intensive operation.", "duration": "5000"}'; fish --command 'oxipng --strip all -r **/*.png'; noctalia-shell ipc call toast send '{"title": "Recursive image optimization", "body": "PNG images optimized recursively."}'
action.description: Recursively optimize all PNG images from the current directory.

action.name: Batch optimize JPEG images
action.command: noctalia-shell ipc call toast send '{"title": "Image optimization", "body": "Optimizing all JPEG images; The system will be solwed down during this CPU-intensive operation.", "icon": "image", "duration": "5000"}'; jpegoptim -s *.jp{,e}g; noctalia-shell ipc call toast send '{"title": "Image optimization", "body": "JPEG images optimized."}'
action.description: Optimize all JPEG files in the current directory

action.name: Recursively optimize JPEG images
action.command: noctalia-shell ipc call toast send '{"title": "Recursive image optimization", "body": "Optimizing all JPEG images recursively; The system will be solwed down during this CPU-intensive operation.", "duration": "5000"}'; fish --command 'jpegoptim -s **/*.jp{,e}g'; noctalia-shell ipc call toast send '{"title": "Recursive image optimization", "body": "PNG images optimized recursively."}'
action.description: Recursively optimize all JPEG images from the current directory.
